# Taypro

> Taypro manufactures autonomous solar panel cleaning robots for utility-scale solar farms in India. Waterless robots on every row (GLYDE, NYUMA, HELYX, and tracker variants), NECTYR fleet operations portal, and ORION plant intelligence (roadmap).

Taypro is an Indian OEM building the autonomous operations layer for utility-scale solar: field execution via waterless cleaning robots, live fleet monitoring through NECTYR, and plant intelligence via ORION. Primary keyword focus: solar panel cleaning robot. Robot models include GLYDE (dual-pass microfiber, fixed-tilt), GLYDE-X (trackers), NYUMA and NYUMA-X (PBT single-pass), HELYX (semi-automatic), MINY (rooftop C&I), and CRADYL row-transfer docking.

## Company

- [Homepage](https://taypro.in/): Company overview, services, and call-to-action
- [About Taypro](https://taypro.in/company): Mission, team, and company story
- [Contact](https://taypro.in/contact): Product inquiries, partnerships, and deployment discussions
- [Utility-scale solar operations](https://taypro.in/utility-scale-solar-operations): Soiling losses, SCADA vs operations, waterless robots, NECTYR, ORION
- [Press](https://taypro.in/press): News and announcements
- [Careers](https://taypro.in/careers): Open roles at Taypro

## Solar panel cleaning robots

- [Cleaning systems overview](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system): All robot models and system options
- [GLYDE — automatic fixed-tilt](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/automatic-solar-panel-cleaning-system): Fully autonomous dual-pass microfiber robot
- [GLYDE-X — single-axis trackers](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/automatic-solar-panel-cleaning-system-for-single-axis-trackers): Dual-pass microfiber robot for trackers
- [NYUMA — automatic fixed-tilt](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/nyuma-automatic-cleaning-robot): Fully autonomous PBT single-pass robot
- [NYUMA-X — tracker robot](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/nyuma-x-single-axis-tracker-cleaning-robot): PBT single-pass robot for single-axis trackers
- [HELYX — semi-automatic](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/semi-automatic-solar-panel-cleaning-system): Pick-and-place PBT robot for distributed plants
- [MINY — rooftop C&I](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/miny-compact-rooftop-cleaning-robot): Compact robot for commercial rooftops
- [CRADYL docking station](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/cradyl-row-transfer-docking-station): Row-transfer and docking for fleet operations
- [NECTYR fleet portal](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/automatic-cleaning-robot-monitoring-app): Schedules, logs, tickets, and fleet dashboards
- [ORION plant intelligence](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/orion-plant-intelligence-platform): Plant health and intelligence roadmap
- [Cleaning service](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-system/solar-panel-cleaning-service): Robot service and maintenance offerings
- [Cleaning technology](https://taypro.in/cleaning-technology): Technical details on waterless dual-pass cleaning

## Buyer guides and calculators

- [Solar cleaning service India](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-service-india): National OPEX/CAPEX service, pan-India coverage
- [Solar O&M services](https://taypro.in/solar-om-services): Robotic cleaning, NECTYR monitoring, SLA framework
- [OPEX pricing per MW](https://taypro.in/solar-cleaning-opex-pricing): Cost structure and manual vs robotic comparison
- [Rooftop cleaning robots](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-for-rooftop): MINY buyer guide for commercial C&I
- [Tracker cleaning robots](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-for-trackers): GLYDE-X, NYUMA-X, CRADYL compatibility
- [Fleet monitoring software](https://taypro.in/solar-fleet-monitoring-software): NECTYR operations portal and ORION intelligence
- [Large-scale solar cleaning](https://taypro.in/large-scale-solar-panel-cleaning): 50–500 MW deployment capability
- [CAPEX vs OPEX guide](https://taypro.in/solar-cleaning-capex-vs-opex): Decision guide for Indian utility IPPs
- [Soiling loss calculator](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-soiling-loss-calculator): MWh and revenue impact estimator
- [Robot manufacturer India](https://taypro.in/solar-cleaning-robot-manufacturer-india): Pune OEM evaluation guide
- [Plant data intelligence](https://taypro.in/solar-plant-data-intelligence): NECTYR telemetry and ORION plant health
- [Enterprise partnerships](https://taypro.in/enterprise-solar-cleaning-partnership): Multi-site IPP and CPSU portfolios
- [Robot price guide India](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-price-india): CAPEX bands, cost drivers, manufacturer keywords
- [ROI price calculator](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-price-calculator): Investment and cost-savings estimator

- [Karnataka](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-karnataka): Utility solar robots in Karnataka
- [Andhra Pradesh & Telangana](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-andhra-pradesh): Utility solar robots in AP/Telangana
- [Maharashtra](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-maharashtra): Utility solar robots in Maharashtra
- [Uttar Pradesh](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-uttar-pradesh): Utility solar robots in Uttar Pradesh
- [Tamil Nadu](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-tamil-nadu): Utility solar robots in Tamil Nadu
- [Haryana](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-haryana): Utility and C&I solar robots in Haryana
- [Delhi](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-delhi): Institutional and rooftop solar in Delhi
- [West Bengal](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-west-bengal): Utility solar robots in West Bengal
- [Chhattisgarh](https://taypro.in/solar-panel-cleaning-robot-chhattisgarh): Utility solar robots in Chhattisgarh
